prophecies.a: 在地球赤道上方约35,786公里的轨道上放置三颗卫星，即可覆盖全球通信。这些卫星与地球自转同步，相对地面静止不动，可作为无线电信号的中继站。
prophecies.a_en: Three satellites placed in orbit approximately 35,786 km above the equator could provide global communications coverage. These satellites would orbit in sync with Earth's rotation, remaining stationary relative to the ground, serving as relay stations for radio signals.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1965年4月6日，世界第一颗商用地球同步通信卫星「晨鸟号」（Intelsat I/Early Bird）发射成功，精确验证了克拉克1945年的构想。如今全球有数百颗地球同步通信卫星在运行，该轨道被国际电信联盟命名为「克拉克轨道」。
prophecies.verdict_en: On April 6, 1965, the world's first commercial geostationary communication satellite 'Early Bird' (Intelsat I) was successfully launched, precisely validating Clarke's 1945 concept. Today hundreds of geostationary satellites orbit Earth, and the ITU has named this orbit the 'Clarke Orbit'.

prophecies.q: 个人通信设备与全球定位
prophecies.a: 未来每个人都将拥有一个袖珍通信装置，无论身在地球何处都能即时联系任何人。这个装置还能让你随时知道自己在地球上的精确位置。
prophecies.q_en: Personal Communication Devices with Global Positioning
prophecies.a_en: In the future, everyone will have a pocket communicator that allows instant contact with anyone anywhere on Earth. This device will also let you know your exact position on the planet at any time.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 智能手机的普及完美验证了这一预言。2000年前后手机已广泛使用，2000年代GPS功能成为手机标配。克拉克在1962年《未来的轮廓》中描述的设备与现代智能手机高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: The proliferation of smartphones perfectly validated this prediction. Mobile phones were widespread by 2000, and GPS became a standard phone feature in the 2000s. The device Clarke described in Profiles of the Future (1962) closely matches the modern smartphone.

prophecies.q: 全球信息图书馆（互联网）
prophecies.a: 未来将出现一个巨大的电子图书馆，任何人在家中都能通过终端获取人类所有已记录的知识——书籍、杂志、报纸、地图。你只需按下按钮就能调阅任何信息。
prophecies.a_en: There will be a vast electronic library where anyone at home can access all recorded human knowledge — books, magazines, newspapers, maps — through a console. You will simply press buttons to retrieve any information.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 万维网（WWW）于1991年面世，到2000年互联网已成为全球性信息基础设施。谷歌、维基百科等平台实现了克拉克所描述的「按下按钮获取所有知识」的构想。1999年克拉克在AT&T采访中再次确认这一预测即将实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: The World Wide Web launched in 1991, and by 2000 the internet had become a global information infrastructure. Platforms like Google and Wikipedia realized Clarke's vision of 'pressing buttons to access all knowledge.' In a 1999 AT&T interview, Clarke reaffirmed this prediction was coming true.

prophecies.a: 未来人们可以通过屏幕面对面通话，看到对方的表情和动作，就像在同一个房间里一样。
prophecies.a_en: In the future, people will be able to talk face-to-face through screens, seeing each other's expressions and movements as if they were in the same room.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 《2001太空漫游》中展示了视频电话技术。2003年Skype推出视频通话功能，2005年后视频通话逐渐普及。如今FaceTime、Zoom、微信视频等已成为日常通信方式。
prophecies.verdict_en: 2001: A Space Odyssey depicted videophone technology. Skype launched video calling in 2003, and video calls became widespread after 2005. Today FaceTime, Zoom, and WeChat Video are everyday communication tools.

prophecies.a: 一种扁平的便携式电子屏幕，可以用来阅读报纸、书籍和各种文档。使用者通过触摸屏幕上的按钮来选择和浏览内容。
prophecies.a_en: A flat, portable electronic screen used for reading newspapers, books, and documents. Users select and browse content by touching buttons on the screen.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 《2001太空漫游》中描述的「Newspad」与2010年苹果公司发布的iPad高度相似。三星在与苹果的专利诉讼中甚至引用了克拉克的小说和电影作为「在先技术」的证据。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 'Newspad' described in 2001: A Space Odyssey closely resembles the iPad released by Apple in 2010. Samsung even cited Clarke's novel and film as 'prior art' evidence in its patent dispute with Apple.

prophecies.a: 未来将出现具有高级智能的计算机，它们能够理解人类语言、进行推理判断，甚至可能产生自我意识。这种机器的智能最终可能超越人类。
prophecies.a_en: Highly intelligent computers will emerge that can understand human language, reason and judge, and may even develop self-awareness. The intelligence of such machines could ultimately surpass that of humans.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 《2001太空漫游》中的HAL 9000是科幻史上最经典的AI形象。2020年GPT-3发布，展示了AI理解和生成人类语言的能力。2022年ChatGPT引爆AI革命，克拉克关于「理解人类语言的智能计算机」的预言已基本实现，尽管自我意识尚未确认。
prophecies.verdict_en: HAL 9000 from 2001: A Space Odyssey is one of the most iconic AI characters in sci-fi history. GPT-3 launched in 2020, demonstrating AI's ability to understand and generate human language. ChatGPT sparked the AI revolution in 2022. Clarke's prediction of 'intelligent computers that understand human language' has been largely realized, though self-awareness remains unconfirmed.

prophecies.a: 未来人们不需要每天去办公室上班。通过先进的通信技术，你可以在家里完成所有工作——开会、查阅文件、与同事协作。城市的概念将因此改变。
prophecies.a_en: In the future, people will not need to go to the office every day. Through advanced communication technology, you can do all your work from home — meetings, documents, collaboration. The concept of cities will change as a result.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1999年克拉克在AT&T采访中明确预测远程办公将成为常态。2020年新冠疫情加速了这一转变，全球数十亿人开始居家办公。Zoom、Teams等协作工具的爆发式增长印证了克拉克的预言。
prophecies.verdict_en: In a 1999 AT&T interview, Clarke explicitly predicted telecommuting would become the norm. The 2020 COVID-19 pandemic accelerated this shift, with billions working from home worldwide. The explosive growth of collaboration tools like Zoom and Teams confirmed Clarke's prediction.

prophecies.a: 未来的机器能够复制任何物体。你只需提供设计图纸，机器就能用原材料逐层构建出实物。这将彻底改变制造业。
prophecies.a_en: Future machines will be able to replicate any object. You simply provide a design blueprint, and the machine builds the physical object layer by layer from raw materials. This will revolutionize manufacturing.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 3D打印技术从2010年代开始快速发展，到2020年已广泛应用于制造业、医疗（打印假肢和器官支架）、建筑（3D打印房屋）等领域。虽然尚未达到克拉克所描述的「复制任何物体」的程度，但核心概念已经实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: 3D printing technology developed rapidly from the 2010s, and by 2020 was widely applied in manufacturing, medicine (prosthetics and organ scaffolds), and construction (3D-printed houses). While not yet at the level of 'replicating any object' as Clarke described, the core concept has been realized.

prophecies.a: 未来购物不需要离开家门。你可以在屏幕上浏览商品目录，选定物品后下单，商品会被送到你家门口。
prophecies.a_en: In the future, shopping will not require leaving home. You can browse product catalogs on screen, place orders, and goods will be delivered to your doorstep.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 亚马逊于1995年上线，到2000年电子商务已成为主流商业模式。如今全球电商市场规模超过5万亿美元，克拉克在1962年描述的「屏幕浏览、下单送达」已成为数十亿人的日常。
prophecies.verdict_en: Amazon launched in 1995, and by 2000 e-commerce had become a mainstream business model. Today the global e-commerce market exceeds $5 trillion, and Clarke's 1962 description of 'browsing on screen, ordering for delivery' is routine for billions.

prophecies.a: 人类将在地球轨道上建造大型永久空间站，作为科学研究和太空探索的前哨基地。宇航员将在那里长期生活和工作。
prophecies.a_en: Humans will build large permanent space stations in Earth orbit as outposts for scientific research and space exploration. Astronauts will live and work there for extended periods.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 《2001太空漫游》中描绘了巨大的旋转空间站。现实中，国际空间站（ISS）于1998年开始组装，2000年起持续有人驻留至今。中国天宫空间站也于2022年建成。虽然现有空间站规模不及电影所示，但「轨道上的永久生活设施」已经实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: 2001: A Space Odyssey depicted a massive rotating space station. In reality, the International Space Station (ISS) began assembly in 1998 and has been continuously inhabited since 2000. China's Tiangong station was completed in 2022. While current stations are smaller than depicted in the film, 'permanent orbital habitation' has been achieved.

prophecies.a: 普通公民终将有机会进入太空旅行。太空旅行将不再是政府宇航员的专利，而成为一种虽然昂贵但可以购买的体验。
prophecies.a_en: Ordinary citizens will eventually have the opportunity to travel to space. Space travel will no longer be exclusive to government astronauts, but become an expensive yet purchasable experience.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2001年丹尼斯·蒂托成为首位太空游客。2021年维珍银河和蓝色起源开启亚轨道旅游，SpaceX的Inspiration4实现了全民用太空轨道飞行。到2025年，太空旅游已成为一个成长中的商业领域。
prophecies.verdict_en: Dennis Tito became the first space tourist in 2001. In 2021, Virgin Galactic and Blue Origin began suborbital tourism, and SpaceX's Inspiration4 achieved all-civilian orbital flight. By 2025, space tourism has become a growing commercial sector.

prophecies.a: 未来科学家将能够改造生物体的基因，创造新的生命形式，甚至改良人类自身的基因以消除疾病。
prophecies.a_en: Future scientists will be able to modify the genes of organisms, create new life forms, and even improve human genes to eliminate diseases.
prophecies.verdict_zh: CRISPR基因编辑技术于2012年被发现，到2020年已广泛用于生物医学研究。2018年贺建奎事件（基因编辑婴儿）引发全球争议。2020年CRISPR发明者获得诺贝尔化学奖。基因疗法已用于治疗镰刀型细胞贫血症等遗传病。
prophecies.verdict_en: CRISPR gene editing was discovered in 2012 and by 2020 was widely used in biomedical research. The 2018 He Jiankui incident (gene-edited babies) sparked global controversy. CRISPR inventors won the 2020 Nobel Prize in Chemistry. Gene therapy is now used to treat genetic diseases like sickle cell anemia.

prophecies.a: 一条从地球赤道延伸到地球同步轨道的缆索，可以用电力驱动的升降机沿缆索上下运输人员和货物，大幅降低进入太空的成本。
prophecies.a_en: A cable extending from the equator to geostationary orbit, with electrically powered elevators running up and down to transport people and cargo, dramatically reducing the cost of reaching space.

prophecies.a: 人类将在月球表面建立永久基地，用于科学研究和资源开发。月球将成为人类太空拓展的跳板。
prophecies.a_en: Humans will establish a permanent base on the lunar surface for scientific research and resource development. The Moon will serve as a stepping stone for humanity's expansion into space.

prophecies.a: 人类将开发小行星上的矿产资源。太空中漂浮的小行星含有大量稀有金属和矿物，其价值远超地球上的任何矿藏。
prophecies.a_en: Humans will mine mineral resources from asteroids. Asteroids floating in space contain vast quantities of rare metals and minerals, far exceeding the value of any terrestrial mine.

prophecies.a: 人类宇航员将亲自踏上火星表面，这将是继登月之后最伟大的太空探索成就。
prophecies.a_en: Human astronauts will set foot on the surface of Mars, the greatest space exploration achievement since the Moon landing.

prophecies.a: 智能机器人将成为家庭助手，能够执行家务、照顾老人和儿童，并与人类进行自然对话。
prophecies.a_en: Intelligent robots will serve as household assistants, capable of performing chores, caring for the elderly and children, and engaging in natural conversation with humans.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2025年家用机器人市场已有显著发展：扫地机器人、智能音箱（如Alexa、小爱同学）已进入千家万户，人形机器人（如特斯拉Optimus）正在开发中。AI对话能力（ChatGPT等）已实现自然语言交互。但全能型机器人管家尚未成为现实。
prophecies.verdict_en: The home robotics market has developed significantly by 2025: robotic vacuums and smart speakers (Alexa, Siri) are in millions of homes, humanoid robots (Tesla Optimus) are in development, and AI conversational ability (ChatGPT) enables natural language interaction. However, an all-purpose robot butler has not yet become reality.
